info.description: Documentation of the Karavantrack API server
info.title: Karavantrack API Documentation

post.description: Authenticate user with email/phone and password
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new token pair
Register a new user and return tokens

get.description: List companies for the current user

put.description: Update company details by ID (owner/admin only)

get.description: List carriers for a specific company

post.description: Add an existing carrier to the company

delete.description: Remove a carrier from the company

get.description: List loads for a specific company with filters

post.description: Add a new member to the company (owner/admin only)

delete.description: Remove a member from the company (owner only)

post.description: Assign load to a carrier and truck
Confirm a completed load delivery (by company/dispatcher)

get.description: Get current tracked position for a load

post.description: Start a load (by carrier, transitions to in-transit)

get.description: Get location history tracking for a load
Get the profile of the authenticated user (includes role)

put.description: Update the profile of the authenticated user

get.description: Upgrades HTTP connection to a full-duplex WebSocket.
